creator: mph@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Imported, with a change similar to the one discussed in private mail. 
At the end of installation, we change to the share/latex2html directory 
and run the install-test program to fix up the paths stored in the scripts. 
Since an interrogation ensues, I've marked it INTERACTIVE and 
NO_PACKAGE, but that's not a big loss because this port does not need 
to build anyway. 

If you notice anything wrong, please let me know. 
Thanks!
